title: rubus × cancellatus
intro: Rubus × cancellatus, also known as the hybrid thimbleberry, is a cross between the Pacific thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus) and the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus). This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × cancellatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
